name: patternpilot-workspace
description: Workspace-bound repo intelligence automation for Patternpilot.

interface.shortDescription: Attach Patternpilot to repos and automate watchlist intake.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin scaffold for Patternpilot workspace discovery, project binding and watchlist automation.
defaultPrompt: Bind this repo to Patternpilot and show me the project context.
Run the watchlist sync and prepare promotions for all projects.
Diagnose GitHub auth and workspace readiness for Patternpilot.
